allies.rationale_text: Opportunity-cost sharpens comparative-advantage by showing what is lost when work stays with the wrong owner.
Specialization gives comparative-advantage the concentrated expertise that makes role reallocation worth doing.
allies.source_quote: specialization, efficiency, and leveraging unique strengths

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias makes comparative-advantage defend an existing role map even after the evidence says the allocation is wrong.
antagonists.source_quote: preventing them from detecting contradictory information

structured_tensions.tension_text: Comparative-advantage conflicts with status-quo-bias when legacy role allocation blocks higher-leverage specialization.
Comparative-advantage conflicts with commitment-bias when sunk ownership prevents reallocating tasks by marginal efficiency.
